zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter Tyrell III Vicomte d’Amiens 3e seigneur de Poix於1060年出生在法國艾時，他的父親Sir Walter Tyrell II25歲，母親Ann De Clare11歲。他和Adelize FitzRichard de Clare至少有6個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於大約1136年在以色列מחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִם享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter Tyrell III Vicomte d’Amiens 3e seigneur de Poix于1060年出生在法国艾时，他的父亲Sir Walter Tyrell II25岁，母亲Ann De Clare11岁。他和Adelize FitzRichard de Clare至少有6个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于大约1136年在以色列מחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִם享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tyrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Tyrrell
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): perhaps a nickname from a derivative of Old French tirer ‘to pull’, in the same sense as French Tirand ‘one who pulls on the reins’, hence ‘obstinate, stubborn’. This name may have become confused with Turrell . A branch of this Anglo-Norman family has been in Ireland since the 12th century. Its name has been Gaelicized as Tirial.
English: habitational name from Tirril (Cumbria), which derives from Old Norse tyri ‘resinous wood’ + erg ‘shieling’.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter Tyrell III Vicomte d’Amiens 3e seigneur de Poix was born in 1060, in Eure, France, his father, Sir Walter Tyrell II, was 25 and his mother, Ann De Clare, was 11. He had at least 6 sons and 5 daughters with Adelize FitzRichard de Clare. He died about 1136, in Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter Tyrell III Vicomte d’Amiens 3e seigneur de Poix est né en 1060, à Eure, France, son père, Sir Walter Tyrell II, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Ann De Clare, avait 11 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles avec Adelize FitzRichard de Clare. Il est décédé environ 1136, à Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israël, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walter Tyrell III Vicomte d’Amiens 3e seigneur de Poix 1060 in Eure, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Walter Tyrell II 25 und seine Mutter Ann De Clare 11. Er hatte mit Adelize FitzRichard de Clare mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb um 1136 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Tyrell III Vicomte d’Amiens 3e seigneur de Poix è nato il nel 1060 nel Eure, Francia, il suo padre, Sir Walter Tyrell II, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Ann De Clare, aveva 11 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie con Adelize FitzRichard de Clare. Morì circa 1136, nel Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israele, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Tyrell III Vicomte d’Amiens 3e seigneur de Poixが1060年にフランスエウアで生まれた時，父Sir Walter Tyrell IIは25歳，母Ann De Clareは11歳であった。彼はAdelize FitzRichard de Clareとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1136年にイスラエルמחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִםで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Tyrell III Vicomte d’Amiens 3e seigneur de Poix(이)가 1060년 프랑스 우르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walter Tyrell II(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann De Clare(은)는 11세였다. 그는 Adelize FitzRichard de Clare(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1136년 이스라엘 מחוז ירושלים יְרוּשָׁלַיִם에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Tyrell III Vicomte d’Amiens 3e seigneur de Poix nasceu em 1060, em Eure, França, seu pai, Sir Walter Tyrell II, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Ann De Clare, tinha 11 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas com Adelize FitzRichard de Clare. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1136, em Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter Tyrell III Vicomte d’Amiens 3e seigneur de Poix родился в 1060 г. в местности эур, Франция, его отцу по имени Sir Walter Tyrell II было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann De Clare, 11. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Adelize FitzRichard de Clare. Он умер около 1136 г. в местности יְרוּשָׁלַיִם, מחוז ירושלים, Израиль в возрасте 77 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas con Adelize FitzRichard de Clare. Murió aproximadamente 1136, en Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel, a la edad de 77 años.
